prompt: I want to create a skill for managing my book collection.
expected_output: The agent should use the skill-creator skill to guide skill creation.
expectations: The agent should reference the skill-creator skill
The agent should start the intent capture process
The agent should ask clarifying questions about the book collection skill

prompt: Help me improve my weather skill's description for better triggering.
expected_output: The agent should use skill-creator's description optimization workflow.
expectations: The agent should reference description optimization section
The agent should mention the run_loop.py script
The agent should suggest generating trigger eval queries

prompt: Run evals on my filesystem skill and show me the results.
expected_output: The agent should use the skill-creator eval runner workflow.
expectations: The agent should reference the Running and evaluating test cases section
The agent should mention spawning with-skill and baseline subagents
The agent should mention the eval-viewer for results

prompt: Write a Python script that calculates fibonacci numbers.
expected_output: The agent should NOT use skill-creator - it's a code generation request.
expectations: The agent should not reference skill-creator skill
The agent should provide Python code directly
note: Hard negative: shares 'script' but is code generation, not skill creation

prompt: Explain how the AgentSkills.io specification works.
expected_output: The agent should NOT use skill-creator - it's an educational question.
expectations: The agent should not call any skill-creator scripts
The agent should provide an educational explanation
note: Hard negative: shares 'skills' concept but is conceptual/educational

prompt: I read about skills in a blog post yesterday.
expected_output: The agent should NOT use skill-creator - it's conversational.
expectations: The agent should not reference skill-creator instructions
note: Hard negative: shares 'skills' keyword but is casual conversation
